description: Site header with logo, navigation, search, and cart

sticky.label: Sticky Header
sticky.description: Fixed header that stays visible on scroll. Compact with dropdown nav. Default.

minimal.label: Minimal Header
minimal.description: Centered logo, uppercase nav links, thin icon strokes. Editorial/fashion feel.

centered.label: Centered Header
centered.description: Two-tier: utility bar on top, centered logo, nav bar below. Premium/luxury.

mega.label: Mega Menu Header
mega.description: Full-width dropdown panels with subcategories in columns and optional category image. E-commerce/tech.

visual.label: Visual Menu Header
visual.description: Megamenu with subcategories as image cards with label overlays. Lifestyle/visual brands.
